subject: [PATCH 09/11] mm/vmstat, memcontrol: Track ZSWAP_B, ZSWAPPED_B per-memcg-lruvec

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch updates the Linux kernel to track ZSWAP_B and ZSWAPPED_B statistics per-memcg-lruvec, allowing for more accurate accounting of compressed memory usage across different nodes. The patch moves these statistics from node_stat_item to memcg_stat_item and renames their prefixes accordingly. It also decouples the updates of node stats and memcg-lruvec stats due to the coarse PAGE_SIZE granularity of node stats. As a result, only NR_ZSWAP_B can be kept accurate, while NR_ZSWAPPED_B is a best-effort value that may not accurately account for compressed objects split across nodes.
